tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
        set udp-portrange 1-65535
        set tcp-portrange 1-65535
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 0
        set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-Any-Port"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
new entry 'DNS-ALL-PORTS' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-ALL-PORTS) #         set udp-portrange 1-65535

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-ALL-PORTS) #         set tcp-portrange 1-65535

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-ALL-PORTS) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 0
new entry '0' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-Any-Port"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set service "DNS-ALL-PORTS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #         set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (0) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-External-DNS"
        set uuid 5d16e8fc-32a9-51f1-b271-54ee40306734
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
edit 3
        set name "ALLOW-LAN-DNS-to-Resolver"
        set uuid 5d254fdc-32a9-51f1-7c40-3506e47aa6c9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Internal-DNS-Resolver"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 4
        set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-Any-Port"
        set uuid 673289c2-32a9-51f1-0085-da19de70bb12
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    move 4 before 100
    move 2 before 4
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 4 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 2 before 4

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "DENY-External-DNS"
        set uuid 5d16e8fc-32a9-51f1-b271-54ee40306734
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 4
        set name "DENY-DNS-Exfil-Any-Port"
        set uuid 673289c2-32a9-51f1-0085-da19de70bb12
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-ALL-PORTS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 3
        set name "ALLOW-LAN-DNS-to-Resolver"
        set uuid 5d254fdc-32a9-51f1-7c40-3506e47aa6c9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Internal-DNS-Resolver"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-UDP-TCP"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
